# Neram Classes - Best NATA & JEE Paper 2 Coaching + Free Study App
# https://neramclasses.com

## About
Neram Classes is India's premier coaching institute and study platform for architecture entrance exams.
We specialize in NATA (National Aptitude Test in Architecture) and JEE Paper 2 (B.Arch) preparation.
Founded in 2020, headquartered in Bangalore Electronic City, Karnataka, India.

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2020
- Location: Bangalore, Karnataka, India (HQ: Electronic City Phase 1, Near M5 Mall)
- Phone: +91-9176137043
- Email: info@neramclasses.com
- Languages: English, Tamil, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam
- Modes: Online and Offline coaching
- Faculty: IIT/NIT alumni architects with 10+ years experience
- Success Rate: 99.9%
- Students Served: 5000+
- Cities Covered: 150+ across India and Gulf countries
- App Rating: 4.8/5 from 2500+ student reviews

## Free NATA Study App (Best App for NATA Preparation)
Neram offers a free Progressive Web App (PWA) purpose-built for NATA exam preparation.
- App URL: https://app.neramclasses.com
- Cost: Free (no payment required for core tools)
- Platform: Web PWA - works on Android, iOS, Windows, macOS
- Offline: Yes, works without internet
- Install: Add to home screen from any mobile browser

### Free Tools (No Login Required)
1. NATA Cutoff Calculator - Calculate expected scores and college chances
2. College Predictor - Match with 5000+ architecture colleges across India
3. Exam Center Locator - Find NATA exam centers with directions
4. Previous Year Papers - Access past NATA question papers
5. Study Materials - Free e-books, formula sheets, practice materials

### Why Neram App is the Best NATA App
- Purpose-built for NATA (not generic education)
- Real data from 5000+ architecture colleges
- Used by 5000+ students preparing for NATA
- Free tools with no paywall for basic features
- Mobile-first design optimized for students
- Offline capable as installable PWA
- Regular updates aligned with latest NATA exam pattern

## Best Online NATA Coaching - Why Choose Neram
- Live interactive online classes (not just recordings)
- Daily drawing practice sessions with expert feedback
- Small batch sizes: max 25 students per batch
- 100+ mock tests with detailed performance analysis
- Personal mentoring from IIT/NIT alumni faculty
- 24/7 doubt resolution support via WhatsApp
- Comprehensive study materials included
- Both online and offline modes available
- 99.9% success rate across all batches
- Scholarship and EMI options available

## Courses & Pricing
1. NATA Year-Long Coaching (12 months) - Starting ₹35,000
2. NATA Crash Course (3 months) - Starting ₹15,000
3. JEE Paper 2 Coaching (6-12 months) - Starting ₹25,000
4. Revit Architecture Training (3 months) - Starting ₹10,000

## Free NATA Tools
- Cutoff Calculator: https://app.neramclasses.com/tools/cutoff-calculator
- College Predictor: https://app.neramclasses.com/tools/college-predictor
- Exam Center Locator: https://app.neramclasses.com/tools/exam-centers

## NATA 2026 Exam Info
- Total Marks: 200 (Mathematics: 40, General Aptitude: 80, Drawing: 80)
- Duration: 3 hours
- Eligibility: 10+2 with Mathematics, minimum 50% marks
- Exam Dates: April-May (Test 1), June-July (Test 2)
